name: qa-browser
description: Framework-agnostic browser QA + role-based smoke testing. Drives chrome-devtools or playwright MCP servers to login as each role, walk modals and table actions, verify UI vs API permissions, capture console / network / screenshot evidence, and produce PASS / BLOCKED / NOT-TESTABLE reports for UAT signoff. Refuses to run destructive actions on non-disposable data and gates production URLs.
